# AZ-900 Lab 04 – Create a Virtual Network

## 🎯 Objective
Create and configure a virtual network in Azure.

---

## 🧠 Key Concepts

### Virtual Network (VNet)
- Private network in Azure
- Enables secure communication between resources

### Subnet
- Logical subdivision of a VNet

---

## 💡 Exam-Relevant Points

- VNet = network foundation
- Subnets segment networks
- VNet Peering connects VNets

---

## 🔍 Deep Dive

### Security
- Private IP ranges
- Network isolation

### Connectivity options
- VNet Peering
- VPN Gateway
- ExpressRoute

### POIneer relevance
- Backend services communication
- Secure database access

---

## 🧪 Quiz

### Question 1
What is a VNet?

A) Storage service  
B) Private network  
C) Database  
D) Compute service  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B – Private network
</details>

---

### Question 2
What is a subnet?

A) Separate region  
B) Network segment  
C) Storage type  
D) VM  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B – Network segment
</details>

---

### Question 3
What connects VNets?

A) NSG  
B) Peering  
C) Blob  
D) Function  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B – Peering
</details>

---

### Question 4
What provides private communication?

A) Public IP  
B) VNet  
C) CDN  
D) Storage  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B – VNet
</details>

---

### Question 5
Which option connects on-premises to Azure?

A) Blob  
B) VPN Gateway  
C) NSG  
D) Function  

<details><summary>Show answer</summary>
✅ B – VPN Gateway
</details>
